def positive_regex_compiled_on_each_hot_call():
    rule_id = "regex_compiled_on_each_hot_call"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag hot functions that compile the same regular expression repeatedly instead of reusing a compiled pattern."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
